name: Tab

variants.name: horizontal
variants.description: Fixed height, variable width stretching to parent. Placed above the view it controls.

variants.name: vertical
variants.description: Fixed width, variable height stretching to parent. Placed to the left of the view it controls.

default_selected.note: Usually the first tab is preselected

icon.note: If any tab has an icon, all tabs must have one.

icon_color.note: Optional semantic color override, e.g. to indicate status

usage_rules.rule: Icons must be consistent across all tabs
usage_rules.detail: Do not mix tabs with and without icons in the same tab group. Either all tabs have icons or none do.
Tab labels must never be truncated. If space is insufficient the tab group becomes scrollable.
All tab labels must use sentence case.

usage_rules.rule: Only one tab selected at a time
usage_rules.detail: Only one tab can be active/selected. The first tab is preselected by default.

usage_rules.rule: Horizontal tabs placed above their view
usage_rules.detail: Place horizontal tabs above the content they control.

usage_rules.rule: Vertical tabs placed to the left
usage_rules.detail: Place vertical tabs to the left of the content they control.

usage_rules.rule: Limit tab count to avoid overflow
usage_rules.detail: Try to limit the number of tabs. If overflow occurs the tab group is scrollable with fade gradient and chevron navigation.

confidence_blockers: If ticket mixes tabs with and without icons, flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket requests truncated tab labels, flag — make group scrollable instead.

embedding_text: Tab component. Navigation tabs organize page content into different views. Horizontal tabs above content, vertical tabs left of content. One selected at a time first tab preselected. Icons consistent all or none. Labels sentence case never truncated scrollable on overflow. Selected indicator line. Keyboard navigable.
